visual_description: A static, medium shot captures a dimly lit bedroom at night. The room is illuminated by the warm glow of a single lamp on a bedside table. In the foreground, a person lies in bed, mostly obscured by a patterned green and white blanket, with only their head visible. To the right, a young child with short, dark hair stands with their back to the camera, facing the bed. The child wears a striped sweater and holds a small, white object, possibly a piece of paper or a stick, in their hands. The background consists of the dark wood headboard of the bed, the bedside table, and a bookshelf filled with books on the far right. The overall atmosphere is quiet and still. The audio consists solely of a high-pitched, electronic ringing sound. It starts at a steady, clear pitch and then begins to slowly and subtly descend in tone, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere, as if building to a reveal or signaling a moment of quiet unease. There is no dialogue or other background noise.
